title: I turn fragile infra into boring, predictable platforms.
paragraphs: I'm Vivek — a Lead DevOps Engineer with 8+ years shipping production systems across e-commerce, payments, and telecom. I've led cloud migrations (Ali Cloud → AWS), designed Kubernetes Operators that automate toil, and built observability stacks that page humans only when humans are actually needed.

Today I focus on platform engineering at scale: running 1000+ Kubernetes clusters for 5000+ engineers, replacing hand-held runbooks with AI-assisted remediation, and treating reliability as a product, not a ticket queue.

highlights.title: Platform at scale
highlights.body: 1000+ clusters, 14 regions, unified control plane. GitOps-first with ArgoCD, zero-drift policy enforced by CI.

highlights.title: Observability
highlights.body: Prometheus + Thanos + VictoriaMetrics + Grafana. PB-scale retention, per-tenant SLOs, burn-rate alerting.

highlights.title: AI for Ops
highlights.body: LLM-backed assistant (Langfuse-traced) to triage alerts, propose remediations, and auto-close low-risk incidents.

highlights.title: Security & compliance
highlights.body: IAM, KMS, GuardDuty, WAF, SonarQube, Qualys, Cortex. Shift-left policies in CI/CD.

philosophy: Every alert should be actionable — or deleted.
If it isn't in Git, it doesn't exist.
